meta.title: the counter at 2:14 AM
meta.notes: The Kwik Stop's fluorescent buzz that runs at 59 Hz beneath every night of the shift. 16-bar loop · no melodic material · just the hum, a tiny sub-drone, and one seven-bar rest before a barely-audible sub-triangle 'sigh' at bar 15. Marc's authorial intent: the player who plays with the sound on should hear the hum before they notice they're hearing it. The sigh at bar 15 is the audio-designer signing his name.
